title: Sam Bankman-Fried loses appeal to overturn 25-year prison sentence
summary: A federal appeals court upheld the former FTX chief’s conviction, while his bid for clemency from President Donald Trump appears to face steep political odds.

title: Bitcoin surfs SpaceX IPO at $64K as trader warns key BTC price support may crumble
summary: Bitcoin hit $64,000 as SpaceX launched a record-breaking IPO and US-Iran peace deal hopes continued to grow, but doubts over BTC price support remained.

title: Space Stocks Tumble as Investors Race Toward Musk’s IPO
summary: SpaceX’s long-awaited initial public offering triggered a selloff Friday in the shares of other rocket, satellite and space-related companies.

title: BloombergNEF Global Energy Market Outlook
summary: Tom Rowlands-Rees, Head, Global Power Markets Analysis, BloombergNEF examines how the Iran conflict is reshaping energy supply, trade flows and market dynamics at the Bloomberg Energy Security Executive Briefing 2026 in Houston. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Crypto Firms Will Own the Octagon at Trump's White House UFC Event
summary: President Trump’s upcoming UFC fight will provide several crypto firms with an unprecedented opportunity for corporate branding.

title: AI Agents Still Can't Stop Prompt Injection Attacks, Researchers Warn
summary: A new benchmark study found AI agents remain vulnerable to prompt injection attacks as companies increasingly roll out the technology to the public.

title: CFTC sues New Mexico in latest bid to assert authority over sports betting markets
summary: New Mexico is the next state in the CFTC's crosshairs as the fight continues over regulatory jurisdiction over sports betting.

title: Former SEC Chair Gensler rejects CFTC claim of authority over prediction market sports betting
summary: Gary Gensler is calling malarkey the claim that the CFTC has jurisdiction over prediction markets, specifically sports bets.

title: Elon Musk becomes trillionaire as SpaceX soars in Wall Street debut
summary: AI and rockets group cracks list of world’s most valuable companies after historic IPO
